name: Mondelez International
description: Mondelez International is a global snack-food company selling biscuits, chocolate, gum, candy, baked snacks, and powdered beverages through brands such as Oreo, Cadbury, Ritz, Milka, Toblerone, and Clif.
notes: Queued from the May 25, 2026 S&P 500 market-cap snapshot ranks 126-150.
